features.name: rogue-expertise-1
features.safe_summary: Choose 2 skills or tools you are proficient in and double your proficiency bonus for those checks.
features.rules_summary: Choose 2 skills or tools you are proficient in and double your proficiency bonus for those checks.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-1d6
features.safe_summary: Once per turn, deal 1d6 extra damage when you hit with a Finesse or ranged weapon and have Advantage or a nearby ally.
features.rules_summary: Once per turn, deal 1d6 extra damage when you hit with a Finesse or ranged weapon and have Advantage or a nearby ally.

features.name: rogue-thieves-cant
features.safe_summary: You know the secret language and signs of the criminal underworld, and can pass hidden messages through ordinary conversation.
features.rules_summary: You know the secret language and signs of the criminal underworld, and can pass hidden messages through ordinary conversation.

features.name: rogue-cunning-action

grants_actions.name: rogue-cunning-action
grants_actions.summary: Use your Bonus Action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide on every turn.

features.safe_summary: Use your Bonus Action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide on every turn.
features.rules_summary: Use your Bonus Action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide on every turn.

features.name: rogue-roguish-archetype-subclass
features.safe_summary: Choose your Roguish Archetype subclass, which grants you specialized features at levels 3, 9, 13, and 17.
features.rules_summary: Choose your Roguish Archetype subclass, which grants you specialized features at levels 3, 9, 13, and 17.

features.name: rogue-steady-aim

grants_actions.name: rogue-steady-aim
grants_actions.summary: Use your Bonus Action to give yourself Advantage on your next attack this turn; your Speed becomes 0 until the end of the turn.

features.safe_summary: Use your Bonus Action to give yourself Advantage on your next attack this turn; your Speed becomes 0 until the end of the turn.
features.rules_summary: Use your Bonus Action to give yourself Advantage on your next attack this turn; your Speed becomes 0 until the end of the turn.

features.name: rogue-cunning-strike
features.safe_summary: When you deal Sneak Attack damage, forgo 1d6 of it to impose a bonus effect on the target.
features.rules_summary: When you deal Sneak Attack damage, forgo 1d6 of it to impose a bonus effect on the target.

features.name: rogue-evasion
features.safe_summary: When an effect lets you make a Dexterity saving throw for half damage, you take no damage on a success and only half on a failure.
features.rules_summary: When an effect lets you make a Dexterity saving throw for half damage, you take no damage on a success and only half on a failure.

features.name: rogue-reliable-talent
features.safe_summary: When you make an ability check using a skill or tool you are proficient in, treat any d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.
features.rules_summary: When you make an ability check using a skill or tool you are proficient in, treat any d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

features.name: rogue-improved-cunning-strike
features.safe_summary: You can now apply two Cunning Strike effects on the same Sneak Attack, paying both dice costs.
features.rules_summary: You can now apply two Cunning Strike effects on the same Sneak Attack, paying both dice costs.

features.name: rogue-devious-strikes
features.safe_summary: Gain three new, more powerful Cunning Strike options: Daze, Knock Out, and Obscure.
features.rules_summary: Gain three new, more powerful Cunning Strike options: Daze, Knock Out, and Obscure.

features.name: rogue-slippery-mind
features.safe_summary: You gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws and Intelligence saving throws.
features.rules_summary: You gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws and Intelligence saving throws.

features.name: rogue-subtle-strikes
features.safe_summary: When an ally is within 5 feet of a creature, you have Advantage on your attacks against that creature even if you have a source of Disadvantage.
features.rules_summary: When an ally is within 5 feet of a creature, you have Advantage on your attacks against that creature even if you have a source of Disadvantage.

features.name: rogue-elusive
features.safe_summary: No attack roll has Advantage against you while you are not Incapacitated.
features.rules_summary: No attack roll has Advantage against you while you are not Incapacitated.

features.name: rogue-stroke-of-luck
features.safe_summary: Once per Short or Long Rest, treat a missed attack or failed ability check as though you rolled a 20 on the d20.
features.rules_summary: Once per Short or Long Rest, treat a missed attack or failed ability check as though you rolled a 20 on the d20.

features.name: rogue-expertise-2
features.safe_summary: Choose 2 more skills or tools you are proficient in and double your proficiency bonus for those checks.
features.rules_summary: Choose 2 more skills or tools you are proficient in and double your proficiency bonus for those checks.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l3
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 2d6.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 2d6.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l5
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 3d6.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 3d6.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l7
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 4d6.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 4d6.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l9
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 5d6.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 5d6.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l11
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 6d6.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 6d6.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l13
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 7d6.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 7d6.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l15
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 8d6.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 8d6.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l17
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 9d6.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 9d6.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l19
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 10d6.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage increases to 10d6.

features.name: rogue-sneak-attack-l20
features.safe_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage remains at 10d6 at level 20.
features.rules_summary: Your Sneak Attack damage remains at 10d6 at level 20.

features.name: rogue-ability-score-improvement-l4
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or gain a feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or gain a feat.

features.name: rogue-ability-score-improvement-l8
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or gain a feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or gain a feat.

features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or gain a feat.

features.name: rogue-ability-score-improvement-l16
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or gain a feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or gain a feat.

features.name: rogue-subclass-feature-l10
features.safe_summary: Your Roguish Archetype grants you an additional feature at level 10.
features.rules_summary: Your Roguish Archetype grants you an additional feature at level 10.

features.safe_summary: Your Roguish Archetype grants you an additional feature at level 14.

features.name: rogue-epic-boon-l19
features.safe_summary: Gain an Epic Boon feat, which also increases one ability score by 1 (up to a maximum of 30).
features.rules_summary: Gain an Epic Boon feat, which also increases one ability score by 1 (up to a maximum of 30).
